subsystem_description: Shop-floor systems managing production execution, real-time equipment control and cold chain environmental monitoring across the EKG Bucharest pharmaceutical manufacturing site
Laboratory, quality management, process documentation and regulatory information systems supporting EU GMP and Romanian ANMDMR compliance and product release
SAP S/4HANA enterprise resource planning platform covering finance, procurement, inventory and production planning together with the employee expense management system
Warehouse management system tracking raw material and finished goods inventory locations across the Bucharest site
Customer relationship management and inbound marketing platform supporting EKG sales to pharmaceutical distributors and hospitals across Romania and the wider region
Systems managing the HR lifecycle for EKG employees including records, payroll, performance, recruitment and factory shift time and attendance
Electronic signature and enterprise content management systems for contracts, quality documents, regulatory correspondence and long-term GMP document retention
On-premises and cloud infrastructure providing server virtualisation, backup, network connectivity, identity management, productivity, ITSM and software development tooling for EKG
Cybersecurity platform providing AI-powered network threat detection and security event management across the EKG Bucharest IT and OT environments
Business intelligence platform providing financial, manufacturing and quality KPI reporting and dashboards for EKG management
Enterprise asset management and engineering design tools covering maintenance scheduling, equipment lifecycle management and facility layout documentation for the Bucharest site
